holdings.infoBox: PEX is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ares Capital stock at 10.06%, 3i Group at 8.67%, Onex Corporation at 8.56%, Sofina Société Anonyme at 7.10%, and Main Street Capital at 7.10%.

overview.description: The ProShares Global Listed Private Equity ETF (PEX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the LPX Direct Listed Private Equity index, a market-cap-weighted index of publicly traded private equity firms around the world. PEX was launched on Feb 26, 2013 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: LPX Direct Listed Private Equity Index
